tags.source: Some survey of markers at field boundaries + BING (imagery shows route during construction)

tags.description: 19th century drinking water reservoir established by Liverpool Corporation (source: National Museums Liverpool)
tags.name: Montrey Reservoir

tags.description: Former reservoir associated with 19th century colliery

tags.name: The Abandoned Lake
tags.note: Former Reservoir for the Aston Hall Brick works.

tags.name: NWEP (North West Ethylene Pipeline)
tags.note:
Coded as G-A 10 on markers.
Runs from Grangemouth to Stanlow.
Built in 1992.

tags.name: West East Link Main
tags.source: Route from BING imagery taken shortly after construction plus some local knowledge

tags.name: Vyrnwy Aqueduct
tags.note: Vyrnwy aqueduct consists of three separate pipelines and runs between Lake Vyrnwy in Wales and Liverpool

tags.description: Six parallel pipelines running able to carry different chemicals (currently ethylene and propylene).
tags.name: SCMP  (Stanlow Carrington Multiple Pipelines)
tags.note:
Coded as G-A on markers. 
Runs from Stanlow to Carrington.
Includes the Stanlow Carrington Ethylene Pipelines (SCEP) and the Stanlow Carrington Propylene Pipeline (SCPP).
new section of pipe installed August 25, 40mm approx
